title: SidecarError
description: JSON-RPC 2.0 error object with steerable-specific extensions.

code.description: Numeric code. Reuses JSON-RPC reserved codes: -32700 ParseError, -32600 InvalidRequest, -32601 MethodNotFound, -32602 InvalidParams, -32603 InternalError. Steerable extension range -32099..-32000.

data.description: Optional structured details (e.g. budget snapshot, tool stack trace, retry advice).

kind.description: Steerable-specific failure category, parallel to numeric `code`.
